**Executive Summary**: Craig Breslow, a key figure in the Red Sox organization, has responded to criticism regarding his handling of the situation surrounding Alex Cora. The controversy stems from Breslow not providing players with an opportunity to ask questions about Cora.

## Context / Background
The Red Sox have been in the spotlight following the firing of Alex Cora, with various opinions emerging on the handling of the situation. Craig Breslow, as part of the team's management, has faced criticism for not allowing players to ask questions about Cora's departure.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Category | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Red Sox Management | Craig Breslow faces criticism for handling of Alex Cora situation |
| Player Reaction | Players reportedly not given chance to ask questions about Cora's departure |

> The situation with the Red Sox and Alex Cora has sparked a lot of debate, with many questioning the handling of the situation by the team's management.

## What's Next?
As the Red Sox move forward, the team will be looking to put the controversy behind them and focus on the upcoming season. The reaction from Craig Breslow is seen as part of the process in addressing the situation and moving forward.
